principles: Automation: use Swift-based launchpad/scratch tools (SPM) and avoid Python for repository automation.

items: \- Maintain DocC parity across broker libs; ensure Services pages list top APIs. \- Keep domain layout conventions stable to simplify OmniBroker adapters. \- Add larger, realistic payloads (multi-quotes with greeks) to perf suite; persist CSV to artifacts directory in CI. \- Add CLI wrapper to run perf outside XCTest and tag runs with build metadata.
sections.title: Near-Term

items: \- Release cadence and KPIs; add docbuild checks in CI. \- Consider optional parser injection for auth flows to keep end-to-end consistency.
sections.title: Mid-Term

title: AGENDA — TradierLib Product Manager
